string.text: Hey {player}, here's {money} rubles for reporting {count} bodies. Keep it up, the Zone needs people like you.
{player}, {money} rubles for your cooperation. Those {count} reports help keep order... or whatever's left of it.
Good work, {player}. Sent you {money} for the last {count} stiffs. Keep 'em coming.
{count} bodies reported, {money} rubles deposited. Keep at it, {player}, there's always work for a stalker with a nose for trouble.
Got your {count} reports, {player}. Transferred {money} rubles. Don't get cocky — the Zone always takes her cut.
